# RelayGuard Copilot Instructions

- Follow phase boundaries strictly; implement only approved scope.
- Make minimal, targeted changes in relevant files.
- Do not silently upgrade dependencies or tool versions.
- Run relevant tests/checks before suggesting a commit.
- Update `docs/project-status.md` and `docs/decisions.md` when scope changes.
- Never expose or commit secrets.
- Do not add routes, database schemas, or later-phase functionality without explicit approval.
